　　秋澄的邻居最近很奇怪，总是阴恻恻的看着她，开口却要给她五百万，邀请她当什么废土主题游乐园体验官。
　　警惕之下，秋澄果断黑进对方的监控。
　　结果发现邻居癫狂说着什么“末世十年被渣男所害，今生奉行人不为己天诛地灭”
　　重生归来，她誓要夺回自己的一切，还要夺走秋澄的一切。
　　秋澄：？？？
　　监控下，重生女为了调动家族资源，将重生前的一切和盘托出。
　　秋澄这才知道，自己是末世里的气运之女，末世之初就占据了最坚固的避难所，还吸引了五名强大的手下。
　　他们每一个都是在废土上叱咤风云的强者，却为她冲锋陷阵，让她的避难所威名远播。
　　重生女计划将她带在身边，利用她的气运，夺走她的一切。
　　对此秋澄表示：报复渣男可以，抢我的东西不行。
　　几个月后，秋澄扶着墙走出房间，深觉自己上了当。
　　是谁告诉她这几个男人只是她的手下的？
　　【食用指南】：
　　①男主兽形都是传说生物或高维生物，有兽人属性，包含双胞胎兄弟。五个男主的兽形分别是：龙、豹、狼、狐、鲛。
　　②设定异能者极其稀少，全球只有几千个，大多数是普通人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/fa399de0807116e977ffb0998112c537~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乘风破浪的春春","author_id":"","book_id":"7604018856599751705","book_name":"末世倒计时，邻居囤粮我囤兽夫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#303840","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7604018898626691609","read_count":"18995","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"204927"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"94","tags":"科幻末世,末世,囤物资,空间,基建,白切黑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fa399de0807116e977ffb0998112c537~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779310046&x-signature=wbwp1HR%2FY4r%2FQMs9RmigWeOM0h0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3457336737012679","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"38"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044726EF59C7774A5CE8B75FF4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_coun
